page_metadata.biotools__summary: STonKGs is a Sophisticated Transformer that can be jointly trained on biomedical text and knowledge graphs. This multimodal Transformer combines structured information from KGs with unstructured text data to learn joint representations.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: STonKGs is a Sophisticated Transformer that can be jointly trained on biomedical text and knowledge graphs. This multimodal Transformer combines structured information from KGs with unstructured text data to learn joint representations.
